text:
Camp Nou, football stadium in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, also known as Nou Camp, Spotify Camp Nou, Estadi del Futbol Club Barcelona. Attributes include: 
- located in the administrative territorial entity: "La Maternitat i Sant Ramon"
- maximum capacity: "+105000 (start time: 2010)"
- occupant: "Futbol Club Barcelona (start time: 1957 ; end time: no value)"
- sport: "association football",
 "rugby league (start time: 2019 ; end time: 2019)"
- country: "Spain"
- Commons category: "Camp Nou"
- date of official opening: "24 Sep 1957"
- officially opened by: "José Solís"
- significant event: "1982 FIFA World Cup",
 "1964 European Challenge Cup",
 "1989 European Cup Final",
 "1999 champions league final",
 "1992 Summer Olympics"
- official name: "Spotify Camp Nou"
- postal code: "08028"
- instance of: "association football venue"
- surface played on: "lawn"
- sponsor: "Spotify"
- capital cost: "+288000000 peseta"
- street address: "Travessera de les Corts, 77-129 / Maternitat, 1-21 / Av. Joan XXIII, 10-14"
